mapper.select: SELECT tb_vlt_cat_idx AS idx, tb_vlt_cat_uuid AS uuid, nm, dsc, sort_ord AS sortOrd, created_by AS createdBy, updated_by AS updatedBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, del_at AS delAt FROM tb_vlt_cat WHERE del_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_ord ASC, created_at ASC

SELECT tb_vlt_cat_idx AS idx, tb_vlt_cat_uuid AS uuid, nm, dsc, sort_ord AS sortOrd, created_by AS createdBy, updated_by AS updatedBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, del_at AS delAt FROM tb_vlt_cat WHERE tb_vlt_cat_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL

SELECT tb_vlt_cat_idx AS idx, tb_vlt_cat_uuid AS uuid, nm, dsc, sort_ord AS sortOrd, created_by AS createdBy, updated_by AS updatedBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, del_at AS delAt FROM tb_vlt_cat WHERE tb_vlt_cat_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_vlt_cat ( nm, dsc, sort_ord, created_by ) VALUES ( #{nm}, #{dsc}, #{sortOrd}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_vlt_cat SET nm = #{nm}, dsc = #{dsc}, sort_ord = #{sortOrd}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE tb_vlt_cat_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_vlt_cat SET del_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE tb_vlt_cat_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
